main_context_direct_rationale: R681-R700 main-context-direct per HONEST DEVIATION POLICY (≤5 real Agent cap reached at R680).
task_tokens_consumed: Is an algebraic-topological invariant-preserving LoRA update mechanism anticipated by 2024-2026 prior art?

hypothesized_clusters.cluster_description: PiSSA, LoRA-GA, HRP and similar use linear-algebraic decompositions (SVD, PCA, eigendecomposition) of pretrained weights to initialize LoRA adapters.
PEFT methods that preserve pretrained structure via subspace projection, null-space constraints, or orthogonality regularizers.
Equivariant or symmetry-respecting fine-tuning that preserves group symmetries (permutation, rotation) of pretrained weights.
S'MoRE, MoSE, and mixture-of-experts variants that decompose LoRA into structured hierarchical components.
EWC and similar parameter-importance anchors that prevent fine-tuning from drifting from pretrained class.

landscape_completeness_claim: Five clusters cover linear-algebraic init, null-space/subspace, symmetry, hierarchical, and catastrophic-forgetting mitigation. Algebraic-topological invariants (cohomology, K-theory) are NOT anticipated in this hypothesized landscape — a possible gap.
